summary: Backend-only testing for MVELO Trading Enterprise. Created pytest suite covering /api/, /api/business, /api/quotes (POST/GET incl validation), /api/contact (POST/GET), /api/status legacy. All 14 tests passed against the public REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py uses deprecated FastAPI @app.on_event('shutdown'); consider migrating to lifespan handlers (non-blocking, low priority).
create_quote has dead branching: 'if payload.service not in BUSINESS_INFO["services"]: pass' — can be removed for clarity.
No rate limiting / spam protection on public POST /quotes and POST /contact endpoints (recommend basic protection like Cloudflare Turnstile/captcha or rate limiting before production).
List endpoints (/quotes, /contact) have no auth — exposing PII (names, phones, emails). Should be admin-protected.
Datetime ISO round-trip via _serialize_doc/_deserialize_doc works but adding a simple Pydantic model_serializer would be cleaner.
EmailStr requires email-validator; verified installed (tests with invalid email return 422 correctly).
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_-prefixed quote and contact records (not cleaned up; list endpoints have no DELETE route). These do not affect functionality.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend pytest suite at /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py covers all endpoints. Run: pytest /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py -v. All endpoints exclude _id correctly. Validation (422) works for missing required fields and invalid emails. POST returns 201, GET returns 200. Public URL via REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL works.
